title: galium pumilum var. hypnoides
intro: Galium pumilum var. hypnoides, also known as dwarf bedstraw or small-flowered bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Galium pumilum var. hypnoides include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
